parameters: Ah you're the new guy!
Whats your second biggest career regret?
Have you seen a pen lid?
I've always dreamed of owning a pen lid.
Only four days til the weekend!
Then again at this place, everydays the weekend!
I passed probation! I never have to work again!
You should go complain about the lack of desks.
I'd go too, if this chair wasn’t so comfy.
What if there were no hypothetical situations?
Why are you standing?
At least you wont get pregnant
If you want to sit on chair. You should buy it dinner first.
Rumour has it someone ate all the scampi in the canteen.
But short of a giant walrus I dont think thats possible
I'd let you sit on my lap. But HR fixed the camera.
Markets awaited the spring
To see what our study would bring
But the papers delayed
Cause of school holidays
Deadlines don't mean a damn thing
Wanna know what happens after you die?
It depends on your life insurance policy.
Have you seen my pig?
Its amazing what you can find if you look hard enough
through your neighours bins
If you're looking for the grads, it's their nap time,
Finally some company... please stay...
Its good working somewhere that makes a difference.
That's why I have a second job.
One pager, two pager, three pager, four
five page, six pager, seven pager more!
Apparently the CEO lost floors 12-14 in a bitcoin scam
What would you do in my position?
Oh, you'd be sitting on this lovely chair.
Hello! Would you be interested in buying
some firm permissions?
[silence]
Sorry think you're on mute
Whoah! This lift is on a whole other level!
I'm waiting here until the retirement kicks in.
These steel doors are so smooth, they remind me of home.
Are you new here? You look happy!
I'm going to be late for my mid morning break!
The lift cables are whispering again.
First dibs on whatever comes out of this lift!
I love him more than timesheets
Whats the timecode for snogging in the broom cupboard?
If you wait here long enough, cake appears
Back in my day, we pretended to work on paper
How am i meant to concentrate
When theres a gorgeous pineapple pizza next to me?
Would you like this job promotion i found on the floor?
Does this top make me look competent?
The carpet feels louder today.
We only get free porridge in January
If you land the right interveiw with the NCA, you can get
porridge for life.
Go away. I've booked this collobaration area for myself.
I may not be a nepo baby
But I still call my manager daddy
The names Bond
Corporate Bond
I love bond research!
Its my GILTy pleasure
haha
...my wife left me
♪  My hairs blue i'm in need of some dye ♫
That policy aged like fine milk.
Do you want to sign Pauls leaving card?
It's a suprise from HR
What? CONC doesn't involve squirrels?
Let's burn that bridge when we get to it
You can’t polish a turd, but you can publish one!
Did you know the romans had state appointed bankers,
known as the mensarii?
No wonder the empire fell.
I hear you're leaving, congratulations!
New job or gross misconduct?
Any idea where lost property is?
I came here on a date on friday and left my earrings
You have terrible posture.
With the right attitude, you can delay anything.
Its so hot in this corner
It feels about 90 degrees
My manager said hiring me was the equivelant of two amazing
employees
two amazing employees leaving
You remind me of a pepperpot!
Take that as a condiment
OINK!
This hallway feels longer after lunch
As long as i'm in this lift my manager cant fire me!
Who's sandwich would you like to steal today?
Brian
Jordan
Tarquin
Brian
It’s labeled “DO NOT STEAL” are you sure?
Yes
No
Compromise and eat half
Yes
You eat the whole sandwich.
No witnesses.
No
The fridge hums approvingly.
Compromise and eat half
You eat half the sandwich.
A crime with leftovers.. not too smart are you?
Jordan
Sandwich stealing is wrong, are you sure?
Yes
No
Compromise and eat half
Yes
The cheese screams as you bite into it.
No
Coward.
Compromise and eat half
You eat half the sandwich.
The remaining half sits in the fridge. Alone. Abandoned.
When the sandwiches owner returns, instead of pitying the
remaining sandwich, he'll look at the remnants in disgust.
What a cruel world.
Tarquin
You realise it's not a sandwich at all, but a
morality test. Do you still want to eat it?
Yes
No
Compromise and eat half
Yes
You eat the sandwich. Sociopath.
No
You put the moral test back in the fridge,
and steal another sandwich.
Compromise and eat half
You eat the sides of the sandwich,
avoiding the morally bits.
Can you leak this document for me?
Is your manager from the PSR?
Cause it looks like you've been give a STANDING ORDER!
Oh my god I won Cher tickets!
I didnt get the job
I'm probably too old for a paper round anyway
There’s no chairs free, but I can make you a counter offer
Do you prefer slowly working it out with a pen and paper
Or using a bidet?
Dear diary
Mood: Apathetic
There once was a man from ED
Whos limerick stopped at line three
he left in a rush
There once was a man from Peru
Whos limerick ended line two.
Zer vonce vos ein man from Bonn
I dont know any more limericks okay?
I've jammed this security door open.
£15 for an office day pass is a rip off!
I could get a pint on the 9th floor for that
